title: Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable memory foam cushions. Great for commuting and focused work.

title: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Full-size mechanical keyboard with cherry MX blue switches, per-key RGB lighting, and detachable USB-C cable. Satisfying clicky typing experience.

title: Running Shoes Ultralight
description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive foam midsole and breathable mesh upper. Designed for daily training runs up to half marathon distance.

title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 32oz
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. BPA-free with leak-proof lid.

title: Cotton Crew Neck T-Shirt
description: Classic fit crew neck tee made from 100% organic cotton. Pre-shrunk, comfortable for everyday wear. Available in multiple colors.

title: Cast Iron Skillet 12 inch
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet perfect for searing, baking, and frying. Oven safe up to 500F. Gets better with every use.

title: Bluetooth Portable Speaker
description: Compact waterproof speaker with surprisingly loud 360-degree sound. 12 hours of playtime, pairs easily with any device.

title: Yoga Mat Extra Thick
description: 6mm thick yoga mat with non-slip texture on both sides. Includes carrying strap. Good cushioning for joints during floor exercises.

title: Denim Jacket Classic Fit
description: Timeless denim jacket in medium wash. Button front closure with chest pockets. Versatile layering piece for any season.

title: French Press Coffee Maker
description: 34oz borosilicate glass french press with stainless steel plunger. Makes rich, full-bodied coffee in 4 minutes. Easy to clean.

title: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: Multi-port USB-C hub with HDMI 4K, 2x USB 3.0, SD card reader, ethernet, and 100W power delivery pass-through. Compact aluminum design.

title: Resistance Bands Set
description: Set of 5 resistance bands with different tension levels. Includes door anchor, handles, and ankle straps. Great for home workouts.

title: Wool Blend Beanie
description: Soft wool blend knit beanie with fleece lining. Keeps your head warm without being itchy. One size fits most.

title: Bamboo Cutting Board Set
description: Set of 3 bamboo cutting boards in different sizes. Knife-friendly surface with juice grooves. Naturally antimicrobial.

title: Wireless Mouse Ergonomic
description: Vertical ergonomic mouse designed to reduce wrist strain. 2.4GHz wireless, adjustable DPI, quiet clicks. Runs on 1 AA battery for months.

title: Hiking Backpack 40L
description: 40-liter hiking backpack with rain cover, hydration bladder compartment, and hip belt. Multiple pockets for organization. Comfortable for day hikes.

title: Slim Fit Chino Pants
description: Stretch chino pants with a modern slim fit. Comfortable enough for the office and weekends. Wrinkle-resistant fabric.

title: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with 5 brightness levels and 3 color temperatures. Built-in USB port to charge your phone. Touch controls.

title: Webcam 1080p with Microphone
description: Full HD webcam with built-in noise-cancelling microphone. Auto light correction and wide-angle lens. Plug and play USB connection.

title: Foam Roller for Muscle Recovery
description: High-density EVA foam roller for post-workout recovery and myofascial release. 18 inches long. Textured surface for deep tissue massage.

title: Flannel Shirt Long Sleeve
description: Brushed cotton flannel shirt in a classic plaid pattern. Regular fit with button-down collar. Perfect for fall layering.

title: Air Purifier HEPA Filter
description: Room air purifier with true HEPA filter. Covers up to 300 sq ft. 3 fan speeds and sleep mode. Removes 99.97% of particles.

title: External SSD 1TB
description: Portable solid state drive with USB 3.2 Gen2 for read speeds up to 1050MB/s. Shock resistant and pocket-sized. Works with PC and Mac.

title: Jump Rope Speed Cable
description: Adjustable speed jump rope with ball bearings for smooth rotation. Steel cable with comfortable foam handles. Good for cardio and crossfit.

title: Winter Parka Waterproof
description: Insulated waterproof parka with detachable hood and faux fur trim. Rated for temperatures down to -20F. Multiple inner and outer pockets.

title: Electric Kettle Temperature Control
description: 1.7L electric kettle with 6 preset temperatures for different teas and coffee. Keep-warm function and gooseneck spout for pour-over.

title: Monitor Stand with Storage
description: Bamboo monitor riser with drawer and phone holder. Raises screen to eye level and frees up desk space. Supports up to 50 lbs.

title: Dumbbell Set Adjustable
description: Pair of adjustable dumbbells from 5 to 25 lbs each. Quick-change weight plates with secure locking mechanism. Space-saving design.

title: Sneakers Casual Canvas
description: Low-top canvas sneakers with vulcanized rubber sole. Classic look that goes with everything. Lightweight and easy to break in.

title: Throw Blanket Sherpa Fleece
description: Oversized 60x80 inch throw blanket with plush sherpa on one side and soft fleece on the other. Machine washable. Perfect for the couch.

title: Noise Machine White Sound
description: White noise machine with 20 different sounds including rain, ocean, and fan. Timer function and adjustable volume. Helps with sleep and focus.

title: Cycling Gloves Padded
description: Half-finger cycling gloves with gel padding to reduce hand fatigue. Breathable mesh back with pull-off tabs. Touchscreen compatible fingertips.

title: Zip Hoodie Lightweight
description: Lightweight zip-up hoodie in soft French terry fabric. Kangaroo pockets and ribbed cuffs. Good for gym or casual wear.

title: Plant Grow Light LED
description: Full spectrum LED grow light for indoor plants. Adjustable gooseneck with desk clamp. Auto timer with 3/9/12 hour settings.

title: Laptop Stand Adjustable Aluminum
description: Adjustable aluminum laptop stand with 6 height settings. Improves posture and airflow. Foldable and portable. Fits laptops up to 17 inches.

title: Tennis Racket Intermediate
description: Pre-strung tennis racket for intermediate players. 100 sq inch head size with good power and control balance. Lightweight graphite frame.

title: Leather Belt Genuine
description: Genuine leather belt with classic brushed nickel buckle. 1.5 inches wide. Ages beautifully with wear. Fits sizes 30-42.

title: Shower Caddy Tension Pole
description: Floor-to-ceiling tension pole shower caddy with 4 adjustable shelves. Rust-proof stainless steel. No drilling needed.

title: Power Bank 20000mAh
description: High capacity portable charger with 20000mAh battery. Dual USB-A and USB-C output. Can charge a phone 4-5 times. LED power indicator.

title: Ab Roller Wheel
description: Ab roller with wide wheel for stability and knee pad included. Builds core strength effectively. Compact and easy to store.

title: Sunglasses Polarized UV400
description: Polarized sunglasses with UV400 protection. Lightweight TR90 frame that's flexible and durable. Includes hard case and cleaning cloth.

title: Bookshelf Floating Wall Mount
description: Set of 3 floating wall shelves in walnut finish. Invisible bracket system for a clean look. Each holds up to 15 lbs.

title: Wireless Earbuds Sport
description: True wireless earbuds with ear hooks for secure fit during workouts. IPX7 waterproof, 8 hours battery plus charging case. Decent bass.

title: Compression Socks Running
description: Graduated compression socks that improve circulation and reduce fatigue during runs. Moisture-wicking fabric. Pack of 3 pairs.

title: Crossbody Bag Minimalist
description: Slim crossbody bag with RFID blocking pocket. Water-resistant nylon with adjustable strap. Fits phone, wallet, keys, and a few extras.

title: Ceramic Planter Set
description: Set of 3 ceramic planters with drainage holes and bamboo saucers. Matte white finish. Sizes 4, 6, and 8 inches.

title: HDMI Cable 4K 6ft
description: High-speed HDMI 2.1 cable supporting 4K at 120Hz and 8K at 60Hz. Braided nylon jacket for durability. Gold-plated connectors.

title: Kettlebell Vinyl Coated 20lb
description: 20-pound kettlebell with vinyl coating to protect floors. Wide handle for comfortable grip. Good for swings, squats, and Turkish get-ups.

title: Rain Jacket Packable
description: Ultralight packable rain jacket that stuffs into its own pocket. Waterproof with sealed seams and adjustable hood. Weighs only 7oz.

title: Smart Plug WiFi 4-Pack
description: WiFi smart plugs that work with Alexa and Google Home. Set schedules and control devices from your phone. Energy monitoring built in.
